blocks.text: "chưa" is used at the end of a sentence to ask whether an action has happened yet (similar to "yet?" in English). It is answered with "rồi" (already done) or "chưa" (not yet).

blocks.vi: Bạn ăn cơm chưa? – Rồi, mình ăn rồi. / Chưa, mình chưa ăn.
blocks.en: Have you eaten yet? – Yes, I already ate. / Not yet, I haven't eaten.

blocks.vi: Bạn làm bài tập chưa? – Rồi. / Chưa, mình chưa làm.
blocks.en: Have you done your homework yet? – Already done. / Not yet, I haven't.

blocks.vi: Anh ấy về nhà chưa? – Rồi, anh ấy về rồi. / Chưa.
blocks.en: Has he gone home yet? – Yes, he already went home. / Not yet.

blocks.text: "chưa" in the negative answer comes before the verb, while "rồi" in the positive answer comes after the verb.
